---
# Meta-records exhibit. Mimics a Meta / Facebook business-record
# export with the canonical black header bar and Author / Sent /
# Body record blocks.
#
# Render with:  quarto render exhibit-meta-records.qmd

format: warrant-vignette-typst
document-types:
  - attachment
  - exhibit

# ---- Header consistency ----
state: "Indiana"
county: "Pawnee County"
city: "Pawnee"
detective-name: "Detective B. Macklin"
case-number: "CR24-087"

# ---- Exhibit content ----
exhibit-description: |
  Attached is the Meta Platforms business-record export of
  Messenger conversations between [Suspect A] and [Suspect B]
  dated 04-22-24, served pursuant to the search warrant.

exhibit-type: meta-records
exhibit-starting-page: 1403
exhibit-records:
  - {author: "[Suspect A]",
     account: "100009604664543",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:47:34 UTC",
     body: "Hey we can get the show on the road the stuff came in"}
  - {author: "[Suspect B]",
     account: "100007123459081",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:47:39 UTC",
     body: "Bet"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]",
     account: "100009604664543",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:48:02 UTC",
     body: "It came 2day"}
  - {author: "[Suspect B]",
     account: "100007123459081",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:48:36 UTC",
     body: "Just the one or both"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]",
     account: "100009604664543",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:49:14 UTC",
     body: "Both"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]",
     account: "100009604664543",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:49:27 UTC",
     body: "What I ordered last month"}
  - {author: "[Suspect B]",
     account: "100007123459081",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:50:06 UTC",
     body: "Are we starting it today"}
  - {author: "[Suspect A]",
     account: "100009604664543",
     sent: "2024-04-22 16:50:30 UTC",
     body: "We can if u want."}
---
